title: Torque to Spin Up the Early Earth
body: Suppose when Earth was created, it was not rotating. However, after the application of a uniform torque for $$6$$ days, it was rotating at $$1$$ $$\frac{rev}{day}$$. Model the Earth as a uniform solid sphere of mass $$5.97\times{10}^{24}$$ kg and radius $$6.37\times{10}^6$$ $$m$$ (I=(2/5)*M*R**2).
